coverage_summary: Mandatory motor third-party liability per Law 132/2017. Up to 1.22M EUR bodily injury, 1.22M EUR property damage. 24/7 claims hotline.
Mandatory motor TPL. Up to 1.22M EUR per claim. Includes roadside assistance Romania+EU. Fast claims process: avg 14 days.
Mandatory TPL. Legal defence coverage included. EU-wide green card. VIG group backing.
Comprehensive motor: own damage, theft, natural disasters, vandalism, glass breakage. Replacement vehicle during repairs. Roadside EU. Own workshop network.
Comprehensive motor: all risks except exclusions. 5% deductible reduces premium. 24h towing. Cashless repairs at 200+ workshops.
exclusions: Mechanical failure, tyre damage without accident

coverage_summary: Comprehensive motor. Fixed deductible 500 EUR. Includes new car replacement in first year. VIG group warranty.
Mandatory home disaster policy (Law 260/2008). Zone A: 100.000 RON coverage. Covers earthquake, flood, landslide. Issued by PAID Pool.
CMR road freight liability per Geneva Convention 1956. Limit 8.33 DST/kg or agreed limit. Covers EU + international routes.
exclusions: Inherent vice of goods, delay losses

coverage_summary: German Kfz-Haftpflichtversicherung per PflVG. 100M EUR bodily injury, 15M EUR property. Included: EU roadside assistance, legal defence. BaFin supervised.
German mandatory motor TPL. AXA Assistance EU-wide. Online claims portal. Telematics option available.
